---
title: "extract"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(pdftools)
library(base64enc)
library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("./ndt-env")
```


```{r}
## collect list of files to convert
## list.files(path = "../ndpdfs/", pattern = "\\.pdf$", full.names = TRUE) %>%
list.files(path = "../ndpdfs", pattern = "consolidated*", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  normalizePath() -> consol
```

```{r}
## convert pdfs in list to pngs at 200 dpi (hopefully good enough)
for (file in consol) {
  pdf_convert(file, format = "png", dpi = 200)
}
list.files(path = "./", pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  normalizePath() -> table_pages
```

```{r}
## mlx_vlm generate --model mlx-community/GLM-OCR-bf16 --image table.png --prompt "Table Recognition:"
for (file in table_pages) {
  system2(py_exe(), 
          args = c('-m mlx_vlm generate',
                   "--model mlx-community/GLM-OCR-bf16",
                   paste0("--image ", file),
                   "--max-tokens 12288",
                   "--temperature 0.0",
                   "--prompt \"Table Recognition:\""),
          stdout = paste0(file, ".html")
  )
}

```
